{{Infobox event
| name = Wormcloud
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A wormcloud is a storm of glowing, sulfur-yellow clouds that results in worms raining from the sky.}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
